no_changes_rationale:
bead: ddx-b14c4924
title: skills: update bead-lifecycle readiness contract

All 10 acceptance criteria are already satisfied by the current repository state.
The work was completed in commit cd652fb59 ("docs(skills): sync lifecycle vocabulary sources").

Evidence per AC:

AC 1: skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md line 16 — "MODE: readiness" listed under invocation modes.
AC 2: skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md line 30 — "`MODE: intake` is the compatibility name for readiness mode."
AC 3: skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md lines 50-69 — all 8 ADR-023 reason codes present:
       too_large, ambiguous_scope, missing_root_cause_or_current_state, missing_verification,
       missing_code_path_assertion, missing_dependency_or_parent, hidden_external_blocker,
       already_satisfied_candidate.
AC 4: skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md lines 41-46 — infra failures (provider outages, quota,
       transport, git index locks, etc.) must be reported as system readiness failures, not bead defects.
AC 5: skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md line 31 — "Treat it exactly like `MODE: readiness` unless
       the caller gives a narrower schema." The preclaim_intake_hook.go prompt includes explicit schema
       instructions that constitute the narrower schema, so the legacy intake contract is preserved.
AC 6: skills/ddx/SKILL.md line 107 — "assess bead readiness" → bead-lifecycle/ in intent router.
AC 7: diff across all four locations produces no output (files identical).
AC 8: `ddx skills check` returns "validated 8 skill files" with exit 0.
AC 9: `make skill-schema` (cd cli/) returns "validated 80 skill files" with exit 0.
AC 10: `lefthook run pre-commit` completes with no failures.

verification_command: grep -q 'MODE: readiness' skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md && grep -q 'compatibility name for readiness' skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md && grep -q 'too_large' skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md && grep -q 'system_unready' skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md && grep -q 'assess bead readiness' skills/ddx/SKILL.md && diff skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md .agents/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md > /dev/null && diff skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md .claude/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md > /dev/null && diff skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md cli/internal/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md > /dev/null && diff skills/ddx/SKILL.md .agents/skills/ddx/SKILL.md > /dev/null && diff skills/ddx/SKILL.md .claude/skills/ddx/SKILL.md > /dev/null && diff skills/ddx/SKILL.md cli/internal/skills/ddx/SKILL.md > /dev/null && ddx skills check skills/ddx/SKILL.md skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md .agents/skills/ddx/SKILL.md .agents/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md .claude/skills/ddx/SKILL.md .claude/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md cli/internal/skills/ddx/SKILL.md cli/internal/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md
